common.name: Name
common.livePreview: Live preview of your creative in context

landing.hero: Reach an audience that thinks deeply.
landing.heroSub: Place your brand alongside philosophical analysis of music, literature, cinema, and news. Reach intellectually engaged users who spend time with ideas.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Simple for advertisers. Clear for operators.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Submit a brief, define your budget, pay securely, review the creative, and track the campaign from a single dashboard.
landing.studioTitle: Bring your own creative or commission one from Philosify.
landing.studioDesc: Static creatives are supported today. If you want Philosify to craft the visual, the mock enters a review loop before launch.
landing.trustTitle: Reviewed, scheduled, and launched with care.
landing.trustDesc: Every campaign passes through an approval flow so the experience stays premium for both audiences and partners.
landing.agencyTitle: Manage campaigns for multiple clients from one dashboard.
landing.agencyDesc: Agencies get their own portal: add clients, run campaigns on their behalf, earn commissions on every impression, and request payouts when your balance reaches $100.

billing.title: Billing
billing.stripeNote: Payments are processed by Stripe. We do not store card details.
billing.faqFunds: Funds are consumed as campaign delivery occurs.
billing.faqBalance: If balance hits zero, new launches wait until funding returns.
billing.faqRefund: Deposits are non-refundable unless required by support intervention.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All campaigns will be cancelled.
settings.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
settings.deletePrompt: Type DELETE to permanently remove your advertiser account.

placements.title: Ad Placements
placements.subtitle: Where your brand appears on Philosify
placements.sidebarDesc: Appears alongside song, book, film, and news analysis results. Full-width image with clickthrough link.
placements.constellationDesc: Appears inside the interactive philosophy knowledge graph. Compact format, high engagement.
placements.sidebarFullDesc: Displayed in the sidebar while users wait for their song analysis results. Analysis takes approximately 20 seconds, giving your ad prime attention during the wait.
placements.sidebarContext: Users submit a song and watch as Philosify analyzes its philosophical themes. During this ~20 second wait, your ad appears in the sidebar - capturing undivided attention while they anticipate results.
placements.sidebarFeature1: High visibility during analysis wait time
placements.sidebarFeature2: Multiple ads can rotate until results arrive
placements.sidebarFeature3: Users are actively engaged, waiting for results
placements.sidebarFeature4: Clickable - opens your URL in new tab
placements.constellationFullDesc: Featured in the Constellation discovery panel where users explore related songs and artists based on philosophical alignment.
placements.constellationContext: The Constellation is an interactive visualization where users discover songs that share philosophical DNA with their favorites. Your ad appears seamlessly in the discovery panel.
placements.constellationFeature4: Clickable - opens your URL in new tab

policy.title: Advertising Policy
policy.responsibilityText: Advertisers and agencies bear full responsibility for all creative content, claims, and compliance with applicable laws. This includes creatives produced with Philosify assistance.
policy.policyLead: These rules protect the Philosify audience, advertisers, agencies, and the platform. All campaigns, creatives, landing pages, claims, and targeting choices must comply with this policy at all times.
policy.responsibilityFull: The advertiser and, where applicable, the agency are fully and solely responsible for all ads posted through Philosify Ads, including creative assets, copy, claims, disclosures, targeting inputs, landing pages, offers, products, services, and legal compliance.
policy.responsibilityCreative: This responsibility applies whether the ad was created entirely by the advertiser or agency, adapted with Philosify tools, or prepared with any creative assistance, drafting, formatting, or mock production provided by Philosify. Philosify's creative assistance does not transfer ownership, legal responsibility, or compliance responsibility away from the advertiser or agency.
policy.responsibleForValue: Accuracy, legality, permissions, rights, disclosures, and destination pages
policy.philosifyMayValue: Reject, pause, limit, or remove any ad at any time
policy.permitted1: Lawful products and services presented accurately and in good faith.
policy.permitted2: Educational, cultural, literary, artistic, and technology-related offers.
policy.permitted3: Apps, platforms, courses, books, events, subscriptions, and media brands.
policy.permitted4: Brand campaigns with clear identity, honest claims, and functional landing pages.
policy.permitted5: Comparative or persuasive messaging that is truthful, substantiated, and not deceptive.
policy.permitted6: Creative that respects intellectual property, privacy rights, and publicity rights.
policy.prohibited1: Illegal products, illegal services, or content promoting unlawful activity.
policy.prohibited2: False, misleading, unverifiable, or deceptive claims, pricing, or offers.
policy.prohibited3: Malware, phishing, spyware, credential harvesting, or unsafe downloads.
policy.prohibited4: Hate speech, harassment, extremist propaganda, or incitement to violence.
policy.prohibited5: Adult sexual content, sexual exploitation, or content inappropriate for a broad audience.
policy.prohibited6: Counterfeit goods, intellectual-property infringement, or unauthorized use of third-party assets.
policy.prohibited7: Fraud, scams, impersonation, fake endorsements, fake reviews, or fabricated urgency.
policy.prohibited8: Weapons, human exploitation, or prohibited drug-related content.
policy.prohibited9: Gambling, sweepstakes, financial, health, or legal claims that lack required approvals or disclosures.
policy.prohibited10: Landing pages that are broken, unsafe, misleading, or materially inconsistent with the ad.
policy.operations1: Submission does not guarantee approval, launch, continued delivery, or uninterrupted distribution.
policy.operations2: Philosify may request edits, supporting documentation, or additional disclosures before launch.
policy.operations3: Philosify may reject, suspend, throttle, or remove ads for policy, security, quality, legal, or brand-safety reasons.
policy.operations4: Philosify may act immediately where there is suspected abuse, fraud, impersonation, malware, or policy evasion.
policy.operations5: Advertisers and agencies must maintain records and substantiation for objective claims when requested.
policy.operations6: Repeated or serious violations may result in account suspension, campaign cancellation, or permanent bans.
policy.warranties1: You have the rights, licenses, consents, and authority needed to publish the ad and destination content.
policy.warranties2: You will comply with all applicable laws, regulations, platform rules, and required disclosures.
policy.warranties3: You will not use Philosify Ads to evade enforcement, hide ownership, or misrepresent products or services.
policy.warranties4: You accept full responsibility for third-party claims, investigations, disputes, and liabilities arising from your ads.
